summary: QA review found a substantive final report (report.md) with an executive summary, a concrete default recommendation (Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct) plus ranked alternatives, explicit hardware/fit guidance for 1x A100 80GB, Hugging Face library context, technique discussion (LoRA/QLoRA + TRL SFTTrainer + RAG), and a references section with relevant URLs. The report includes embedded code and provides a line-by-line explanation. Standalone snippet files in snippets/ compile successfully.
